Hospital Operations Dashboard and Priority Map

Published

May 5, 2026

Code 
# Database connection
library(DBI)
library(RMariaDB)
library(ini)

library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(patchwork)
library(ggrepel)
library(ggtext)
library(ragg)
library(glue)
Code 
config <- read.ini("config.ini")

con <- dbConnect(
  RMariaDB::MariaDB(),
  host     = config$database$host,
  port     = as.integer(config$database$port),
  user     = config$database$user,
  password = config$database$password,
  dbname   = config$database$dbname
)
Code 
# Quality indicator dashboard data
qi <- dbGetQuery(con, "
  SELECT qi.IndicatorName, qi.CatchmentArea, d.DepartmentName, qi.Numerator, qi.Denominator,
  qi.ComputedValue, qi.SeverityFlag, qi.ReportingPeriodStart, qi.ReportingPeriodEnd
  FROM quality_indicators qi
  LEFT JOIN departments d ON qi.DepartmentID = d.DepartmentID
  ORDER BY qi.IndicatorName, qi.CatchmentArea, d.DepartmentName;
") |>
  mutate(
    # Severity order and reporting unit
    qi_flag = factor(SeverityFlag, levels = c("normal", "elevated", "critical")),
    qi_unit = coalesce(CatchmentArea, DepartmentName)
)

# Dashboard summary inputs
qi_period <- paste(format(min(qi$ReportingPeriodStart), "%b %Y"), "–",
                   format(max(qi$ReportingPeriodEnd),   "%b %Y"))
flagged_qi <- sum(qi$SeverityFlag != "normal")
total_qi <- nrow(qi)
flag_cols <- c(normal = "darkseagreen", elevated = "darkorange", critical = "firebrick")
Code 
# Dashboard visual theme
theme_qi_panel <- function(base_size = 11) {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size, base_family = "sans") +
    theme(
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "gray98", color = NA),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "gray98", color = NA),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.3),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks = element_blank(),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 9, color = "gray40", margin = margin(t = 6)),
      axis.title.y = element_blank(),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 9, color = "gray25"),
      legend.position = "none",
      plot.title = element_markdown(face = "bold", size = 12, color = "gray10",
                                    margin = margin(b = 2)),
      plot.subtitle = element_markdown(size = 9.5, color = "gray40",
                                       margin = margin(b = 10)),
      plot.title.position = "plot"
    )
}
Code 
# Indicator panel template
qi_panel <- function(qi_name, p_title, p_subtitle,
                     x_label, cutoff1, cutoff2,
                     v_format = label_percent(scale = 1, accuracy = 0.1)) {
  
  # Panel display order
  panel_data <- qi |>
    filter(IndicatorName == qi_name) |>
    arrange(qi_flag, ComputedValue) |>
    mutate(qi_unit = fct_reorder(qi_unit, ComputedValue))
  
  # Reference cutoff lines
  cutoff_data <- data.frame(x = c(cutoff1, cutoff2),
                            label = c("elevated", "critical"),
                            color = unname(flag_cols[c("elevated", "critical")]))
  
  ggplot(panel_data, aes(x = ComputedValue, y = qi_unit, color = qi_flag)) +
    geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = ComputedValue, yend = qi_unit),
                 linewidth = 0.6, alpha = 0.85) +
    geom_point(size = 4) +
    geom_text(aes(label = v_format(ComputedValue)),
              size = 3, hjust = -0.35, color = "grey30") +
    geom_vline(data = cutoff_data, aes(xintercept = x, color = I(color)),
               linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.3) +
    geom_text(data = cutoff_data, aes(x = x, y = 0.6, label = label, color = I(color)),
              size = 2.6, hjust = -0.1, vjust = 0) +
    scale_color_manual(values = flag_cols, drop = FALSE) +
    scale_x_continuous(labels = v_format,
                       expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.20))) +
    labs(title = p_title, subtitle = p_subtitle,
         x = x_label, y = NULL) +
    theme_qi_panel()
}
Code 
# Individual dashboard panels
p1 <- qi_panel(qi_name = "first_encounter_complication_rate",
               p_title = "**First-encounter complication rate** by catchment area",
               p_subtitle = "% of patients whose first encounter was ED or inpatient",
               x_label = "Complication rate", cutoff1 = 30, cutoff2 = 50)

p2 <- qi_panel(qi_name = "readmission_rate_30d",
               p_title = "**30-day readmission rate** by catchment area",
               p_subtitle = "Readmissions per inpatient + ED encounter",
               x_label = "Readmission rate", cutoff1 = 5, cutoff2 = 10)

p3 <- qi_panel(qi_name = "bed_utilization_rate",
               p_title = "**Bed utilization rate** by department",
               p_subtitle = "Inpatient bed-days used ÷ (bed capacity × days in period)",
               x_label = "Utilization rate", cutoff1 = 70, cutoff2 = 85)

p4 <- qi_panel(qi_name = "provider_workload_index",
               p_title = "**Provider workload index** by department",
               p_subtitle = "Encounters per active clinical staff-day",
               x_label = "Encounters per staff-day", cutoff1 = 0.3, cutoff2 = 0.5,
               v_format = label_number(accuracy = 0.0001))
Code 
# Dashboard layout
dashboard <- (patchwork::free(p1, side = "l") | p2) / (p3 | p4) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Quality Indicator Dashboard", subtitle = glue(
      "Reporting period: **{qi_period}** | ",
      "<span style='color:firebrick;'>**{flagged_qi} of {total_qi}**</span> measures ",
      "flagged elevated or critical"),
    theme = theme(
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "gray90", color = NA),
      plot.title = element_markdown(family = "serif", face = "bold",
                                    size = 18, color = "gray10",
                                    margin = margin(b = 4)),
      plot.subtitle = element_markdown(size = 10.5, color = "gray30",
                                       lineheight = 1.3,
                                       margin = margin(b = 14))
      )
    )

dashboard

Chronic disease priority map data

Code 
# Chronic disease priority map data
priority_data <- dbGetQuery(con, "
  SELECT 
    p.CatchmentArea,
    e.InsuranceType,
    COUNT(*) AS TotalEncounters,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.EncounterType IN ('emergency', 'inpatient') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Complications,
    ROUND(
      SUM(CASE WHEN e.EncounterType IN ('emergency', 'inpatient') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*),
      1
    ) AS ComplicationPct,
    ROUND(AVG(e.EncounterCost), 2) AS AvgCost
  FROM encounters e
  JOIN patients p ON e.PatientID = p.PatientID
  WHERE LOWER(e.ChiefComplaint) REGEXP
    'diabetic|hypoglycemic|diabetes|hypertens|asthma|heart failure'
  GROUP BY p.CatchmentArea, e.InsuranceType
  ORDER BY p.CatchmentArea, e.InsuranceType;
") |>
  mutate(
    # Plotting variables
    complication_rate = ComplicationPct,
    average_cost = AvgCost
  )

Priority reference lines

Code 
# Priority reference lines
rate_median <- median(priority_data$complication_rate, na.rm = TRUE)
cost_median <- median(priority_data$average_cost, na.rm = TRUE)

Chronic disease priority map

Code 
# Chronic disease priority map data
priority_data <- dbGetQuery(con, "
  SELECT p.CatchmentArea, e.InsuranceType,
    COUNT(*) AS TotalEncounters,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.EncounterType IN ('emergency', 'inpatient') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Complications,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN e.EncounterType IN ('emergency', 'inpatient') THEN 1 
      ELSE 0 END) * 100 / COUNT(*), 1) AS ComplicationPct,
    ROUND(AVG(e.EncounterCost), 2) AS AvgCost
  FROM encounters e
  JOIN patients p ON e.PatientID = p.PatientID
  WHERE LOWER(e.ChiefComplaint) REGEXP
    'diabetic|hypoglycemic|diabetes|hypertens|asthma|heart failure'
  GROUP BY p.CatchmentArea, e.InsuranceType
  ORDER BY p.CatchmentArea, e.InsuranceType;
") |>
  mutate(
    # Plotting variables
    complication_rate = ComplicationPct,
    average_cost = AvgCost
  )

# Priority reference lines
rate_mean <- mean(priority_data$complication_rate, na.rm = TRUE)
cost_mean <- mean(priority_data$average_cost, na.rm = TRUE)
Code 
# Chronic disease priority map
priority_map <- ggplot(priority_data, aes(x = complication_rate, y = average_cost,
                                          size = TotalEncounters, color = InsuranceType)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = rate_mean, linetype = "dashed",
             linewidth = 0.4, color = "gray55") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = cost_mean, linetype = "dashed",
             linewidth = 0.4, color = "gray55") +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.70) +
  geom_text_repel(aes(label = CatchmentArea), size = 2.2,
                  nudge_x = -3, direction = "y", hjust = 1,
                  segment.color = NA,
                  box.padding = 0.15, point.padding = 0.20,
                  max.overlaps = Inf, show.legend = FALSE) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(labels = label_percent(scale = 1, accuracy = 1),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0.10, 0.12))) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_dollar(accuracy = 1),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0.08, 0.12))) +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "Chronic-disease\nencounters",
                        range = c(2.5, 8)) +
  
  labs(title = "Chronic Disease Priority Map: Access Burden, Cost, and Volume",
       subtitle = "Dashed lines show mean complication rate and mean cost",
       x = "ED/inpatient complication rate", y = "Average encounter cost",
       color = "Insurance type") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = "gray95", color = NA),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "gray98", color = NA),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray35"), legend.position = "right")

priority_map

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
  fig.width = 8, fig.height = 5
)
```


```{r}
#| label: libraries
# Database connection
library(DBI)
library(RMariaDB)
library(ini)

library(tidyverse)
library(scales)
library(patchwork)
library(ggrepel)
library(ggtext)
library(ragg)
library(glue)
```


```{r}
#| label: db-connection
config <- read.ini("config.ini")

con <- dbConnect(
  RMariaDB::MariaDB(),
  host     = config$database$host,
  port     = as.integer(config$database$port),
  user     = config$database$user,
  password = config$database$password,
  dbname   = config$database$dbname
)
```


```{r}
# Quality indicator dashboard data
qi <- dbGetQuery(con, "
  SELECT qi.IndicatorName, qi.CatchmentArea, d.DepartmentName, qi.Numerator, qi.Denominator,
  qi.ComputedValue, qi.SeverityFlag, qi.ReportingPeriodStart, qi.ReportingPeriodEnd
  FROM quality_indicators qi
  LEFT JOIN departments d ON qi.DepartmentID = d.DepartmentID
  ORDER BY qi.IndicatorName, qi.CatchmentArea, d.DepartmentName;
") |>
  mutate(
    # Severity order and reporting unit
    qi_flag = factor(SeverityFlag, levels = c("normal", "elevated", "critical")),
    qi_unit = coalesce(CatchmentArea, DepartmentName)
)

# Dashboard summary inputs
qi_period <- paste(format(min(qi$ReportingPeriodStart), "%b %Y"), "–",
                   format(max(qi$ReportingPeriodEnd),   "%b %Y"))
flagged_qi <- sum(qi$SeverityFlag != "normal")
total_qi <- nrow(qi)
flag_cols <- c(normal = "darkseagreen", elevated = "darkorange", critical = "firebrick")
```

```{r}
# Dashboard visual theme
theme_qi_panel <- function(base_size = 11) {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size, base_family = "sans") +
    theme(
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "gray98", color = NA),
      panel.background = element_rect(fill = "gray98", color = NA),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.3),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks = element_blank(),
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 9, color = "gray40", margin = margin(t = 6)),
      axis.title.y = element_blank(),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 9, color = "gray25"),
      legend.position = "none",
      plot.title = element_markdown(face = "bold", size = 12, color = "gray10",
                                    margin = margin(b = 2)),
      plot.subtitle = element_markdown(size = 9.5, color = "gray40",
                                       margin = margin(b = 10)),
      plot.title.position = "plot"
    )
}
```


```{r}
# Indicator panel template
qi_panel <- function(qi_name, p_title, p_subtitle,
                     x_label, cutoff1, cutoff2,
                     v_format = label_percent(scale = 1, accuracy = 0.1)) {
  
  # Panel display order
  panel_data <- qi |>
    filter(IndicatorName == qi_name) |>
    arrange(qi_flag, ComputedValue) |>
    mutate(qi_unit = fct_reorder(qi_unit, ComputedValue))
  
  # Reference cutoff lines
  cutoff_data <- data.frame(x = c(cutoff1, cutoff2),
                            label = c("elevated", "critical"),
                            color = unname(flag_cols[c("elevated", "critical")]))
  
  ggplot(panel_data, aes(x = ComputedValue, y = qi_unit, color = qi_flag)) +
    geom_segment(aes(x = 0, xend = ComputedValue, yend = qi_unit),
                 linewidth = 0.6, alpha = 0.85) +
    geom_point(size = 4) +
    geom_text(aes(label = v_format(ComputedValue)),
              size = 3, hjust = -0.35, color = "grey30") +
    geom_vline(data = cutoff_data, aes(xintercept = x, color = I(color)),
               linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.3) +
    geom_text(data = cutoff_data, aes(x = x, y = 0.6, label = label, color = I(color)),
              size = 2.6, hjust = -0.1, vjust = 0) +
    scale_color_manual(values = flag_cols, drop = FALSE) +
    scale_x_continuous(labels = v_format,
                       expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.20))) +
    labs(title = p_title, subtitle = p_subtitle,
         x = x_label, y = NULL) +
    theme_qi_panel()
}
```

```{r}
# Individual dashboard panels
p1 <- qi_panel(qi_name = "first_encounter_complication_rate",
               p_title = "**First-encounter complication rate** by catchment area",
               p_subtitle = "% of patients whose first encounter was ED or inpatient",
               x_label = "Complication rate", cutoff1 = 30, cutoff2 = 50)

p2 <- qi_panel(qi_name = "readmission_rate_30d",
               p_title = "**30-day readmission rate** by catchment area",
               p_subtitle = "Readmissions per inpatient + ED encounter",
               x_label = "Readmission rate", cutoff1 = 5, cutoff2 = 10)

p3 <- qi_panel(qi_name = "bed_utilization_rate",
               p_title = "**Bed utilization rate** by department",
               p_subtitle = "Inpatient bed-days used ÷ (bed capacity × days in period)",
               x_label = "Utilization rate", cutoff1 = 70, cutoff2 = 85)

p4 <- qi_panel(qi_name = "provider_workload_index",
               p_title = "**Provider workload index** by department",
               p_subtitle = "Encounters per active clinical staff-day",
               x_label = "Encounters per staff-day", cutoff1 = 0.3, cutoff2 = 0.5,
               v_format = label_number(accuracy = 0.0001))
```

```{r}
#| label: quality-dashboard
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 10
#| out-width: "100%"
# Dashboard layout
dashboard <- (patchwork::free(p1, side = "l") | p2) / (p3 | p4) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Quality Indicator Dashboard", subtitle = glue(
      "Reporting period: **{qi_period}** | ",
      "<span style='color:firebrick;'>**{flagged_qi} of {total_qi}**</span> measures ",
      "flagged elevated or critical"),
    theme = theme(
      plot.background = element_rect(fill = "gray90", color = NA),
      plot.title = element_markdown(family = "serif", face = "bold",
                                    size = 18, color = "gray10",
                                    margin = margin(b = 4)),
      plot.subtitle = element_markdown(size = 10.5, color = "gray30",
                                       lineheight = 1.3,
                                       margin = margin(b = 14))
      )
    )

dashboard
```


## Chronic disease priority map data

```{r}
#| label: priority-map-data
#| echo: true

# Chronic disease priority map data
priority_data <- dbGetQuery(con, "
  SELECT 
    p.CatchmentArea,
    e.InsuranceType,
    COUNT(*) AS TotalEncounters,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.EncounterType IN ('emergency', 'inpatient') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Complications,
    ROUND(
      SUM(CASE WHEN e.EncounterType IN ('emergency', 'inpatient') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*),
      1
    ) AS ComplicationPct,
    ROUND(AVG(e.EncounterCost), 2) AS AvgCost
  FROM encounters e
  JOIN patients p ON e.PatientID = p.PatientID
  WHERE LOWER(e.ChiefComplaint) REGEXP
    'diabetic|hypoglycemic|diabetes|hypertens|asthma|heart failure'
  GROUP BY p.CatchmentArea, e.InsuranceType
  ORDER BY p.CatchmentArea, e.InsuranceType;
") |>
  mutate(
    # Plotting variables
    complication_rate = ComplicationPct,
    average_cost = AvgCost
  )
```

## Priority reference lines

```{r}
#| label: priority-reference-lines
#| echo: true

# Priority reference lines
rate_median <- median(priority_data$complication_rate, na.rm = TRUE)
cost_median <- median(priority_data$average_cost, na.rm = TRUE)
```

## Chronic disease priority map

```{r}
# Chronic disease priority map data
priority_data <- dbGetQuery(con, "
  SELECT p.CatchmentArea, e.InsuranceType,
    COUNT(*) AS TotalEncounters,
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.EncounterType IN ('emergency', 'inpatient') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Complications,
    ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN e.EncounterType IN ('emergency', 'inpatient') THEN 1 
      ELSE 0 END) * 100 / COUNT(*), 1) AS ComplicationPct,
    ROUND(AVG(e.EncounterCost), 2) AS AvgCost
  FROM encounters e
  JOIN patients p ON e.PatientID = p.PatientID
  WHERE LOWER(e.ChiefComplaint) REGEXP
    'diabetic|hypoglycemic|diabetes|hypertens|asthma|heart failure'
  GROUP BY p.CatchmentArea, e.InsuranceType
  ORDER BY p.CatchmentArea, e.InsuranceType;
") |>
  mutate(
    # Plotting variables
    complication_rate = ComplicationPct,
    average_cost = AvgCost
  )

# Priority reference lines
rate_mean <- mean(priority_data$complication_rate, na.rm = TRUE)
cost_mean <- mean(priority_data$average_cost, na.rm = TRUE)
```


```{r}
# Chronic disease priority map
priority_map <- ggplot(priority_data, aes(x = complication_rate, y = average_cost,
                                          size = TotalEncounters, color = InsuranceType)) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = rate_mean, linetype = "dashed",
             linewidth = 0.4, color = "gray55") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = cost_mean, linetype = "dashed",
             linewidth = 0.4, color = "gray55") +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.70) +
  geom_text_repel(aes(label = CatchmentArea), size = 2.2,
                  nudge_x = -3, direction = "y", hjust = 1,
                  segment.color = NA,
                  box.padding = 0.15, point.padding = 0.20,
                  max.overlaps = Inf, show.legend = FALSE) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(labels = label_percent(scale = 1, accuracy = 1),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0.10, 0.12))) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = label_dollar(accuracy = 1),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0.08, 0.12))) +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "Chronic-disease\nencounters",
                        range = c(2.5, 8)) +
  
  labs(title = "Chronic Disease Priority Map: Access Burden, Cost, and Volume",
       subtitle = "Dashed lines show mean complication rate and mean cost",
       x = "ED/inpatient complication rate", y = "Average encounter cost",
       color = "Insurance type") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = "gray95", color = NA),
        panel.background = element_rect(fill = "gray98", color = NA),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 15),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray35"), legend.position = "right")

priority_map
```
